products.name: Premium Dog Food - Chicken & Rice
products.description: High-protein formula with real chicken and brown rice. Perfect for adult dogs with sensitive stomachs. Contains essential vitamins and minerals for healthy coat and immune system.
products.details: Weight: 5 lbs (2.27 kg) | Serving: 1-2 cups daily | Ingredients: Chicken, Brown Rice, Sweet Potato, Fish Meal

products.name: Organic Kitten Formula
products.description: Specially formulated for growing kittens. Rich in DHA for brain development and taurine for eye health. Made with organic, natural ingredients.
products.details: Weight: 3 lbs (1.36 kg) | Serving: 3-4 cups daily | Ingredients: Organic Chicken, Organic Fish, Organic Carrots

products.name: Joint Support Supplements
products.description: Glucosamine and chondroitin blend to support aging dogs and cats. Reduces joint pain and improves mobility. Vet-recommended formula.
products.details: Count: 120 tablets | Serving: 1-2 tablets daily | Active: Glucosamine 500mg, Chondroitin 400mg

products.name: Natural Dog Treats - Beef
products.description: 100% all-natural beef treats made without grains, artificial colors, or preservatives. Perfect for training or rewarding good behavior.
products.details: Weight: 4 oz (113g) | Count: ~20 pieces | Ingredients: Beef, Salt

products.name: Fish Oil Omega-3 Supplement
products.description: Premium fish oil rich in Omega-3 fatty acids. Supports healthy skin, shiny coat, and cognitive function. Great for dogs and cats.
products.details: Count: 180 capsules | Serving: 1-2 capsules daily | Strength: 1000mg per capsule

products.name: Grain-Free Cat Food - Salmon
products.description: Grain-free formula with real salmon and sweet potato. Easier to digest and high in protein. Supports urinary health.
products.details: Weight: 4 lbs (1.81 kg) | Serving: 2-3 cups daily | Ingredients: Salmon, Potato, Pea, Fish Meal

products.name: Dental Chews for Dogs
products.description: Specially designed dental chews that clean teeth while your dog chews. Reduces tartar buildup naturally. Approved by veterinarians.
products.details: Pack: 30 chews | Weight: 8 oz | Serving: 1-2 daily | Flavor: Minty Fresh

products.name: Senior Dog Food - Lamb & Rice
products.description: Specially formulated for senior dogs (7+ years). Lower calories with added joint support. Easy to digest with lower fat content.
products.details: Weight: 6 lbs (2.72 kg) | Serving: 1.5-2 cups daily | Ingredients: Lamb, Brown Rice, Sweet Potato, Fish Meal

products.name: Probiotic Digestive Supplement
products.description: Beneficial bacteria blend to improve digestive health. Helps with bloating, gas, and irregular stools. For dogs and cats.
products.details: Count: 90 capsules | Serving: 1 capsule daily | Strains: 8 beneficial cultures

products.name: Interactive Treat Puzzle Toy
products.description: Durable rubber puzzle toy that dispenses treats as your pet plays. Mental stimulation and physical exercise in one. Suitable for dogs and cats.
products.details: Material: Food-safe rubber | Difficulty: Medium | Cleaning: Dishwasher safe | Colors: Red/Blue
